highlights.description: Multi-window support - open multiple windows with independent grid layouts sharing the same session pool
Pop-out sessions - expand any session to its own dedicated window
Renamed from Nexus to PlexusOne Desktop

added.description: Multi-window support with independent grid layouts per window
Pop-out session feature to open sessions in dedicated 1×1 windows
AppState singleton for shared state across windows
WindowStateManager for multi-window persistence
Multi-window state models (WindowConfig, WindowFrame, MultiWindowState)

changed.description: Renamed from Nexus to PlexusOne Desktop
State file renamed from nexus_state.json to state.json

tests.description: Unit tests for multi-window state models and WindowStateManager

documentation.description: Updated all docs to PlexusOne Desktop branding

highlights.description: Terminal trackpad/mouse wheel scrolling now works with tmux and other mouse-aware applications
MkDocs documentation site for project documentation

added.description: Mouse wheel scrolling for terminal applications (tmux, vim, less) when mouse mode is enabled
MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Project tasks tracking in TASKS.md

fixed.description: App activation on launch - dock clicks and Cmd+Tab now work correctly

documentation.description: Scrollbar research and implementation design documents
Remove references to internal ideation documents

build.description: Update SwiftTerm to main branch for NSScroller Auto Layout fix

highlights.description: Initial release of PlexusOne Desktop - a multi-platform terminal client for AI agent sessions
macOS desktop app with SwiftUI, tmux session management, and multi-pane grid layout
Flutter mobile companion app with WebSocket connectivity
TUI parser backend service for terminal output parsing and WebSocket bridging

added.description: macOS desktop app with SwiftUI and SwiftTerm integration
Terminal controller with SwiftTerm for tmux session attachment
Grid layout system with configurable pane arrangements
Session manager service for tmux session lifecycle
Session state persistence across app restarts
New session sheet and settings view
Status bar with session picker
App bundle with PlexusOne icon
Flutter mobile app with home screen and terminal view
WebSocket service for mobile-to-backend connectivity
Terminal dark theme for mobile
Prompt bar with quick actions
Session tabs widget for mobile navigation
Settings screen for mobile configuration
TUI parser Go module with WebSocket server
Tmux session manager for backend
WebSocket protocol messages for client-server communication
Debug console for TUI parser development
